calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-07-2006 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: July 5, 2006, Judge Pro Tem Richard Beckman, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeals, Kirsten Voyles, Esq. appears for respondent, Sam Romero appears for Appellant Eastshore Charter Lines, (Bus #405)
9:16am
Ms. Voyles asks that the appeal be dismissed as untimely.
9:25am
The appeal is dismissed due to an untimely filing of the appeal. Mr. Romero objects to the court dismissing the matter stating that he did not receive the Small Claims Judgment until a month after the mailing. Judge Beckman advises Mr. Romero that lacking proof of that fact the court stands by the dismissal. Judge Beckman advises Mr. Romero to seek legal advice if he objects to the ruling.
